spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (document.querySelector, SharedWorker) with runtime script (~2814 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface — 4 buttons, 0 inputs, 0 selects, 0 ranges — wired up via event listeners.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (android, instantly, message, note, others, share, sharedworker, simulated, single, source, syncs, tabs, three, truth, ty).

edge_cases.rationale: No visible edge case / fallback / error handling — only the happy path.

references.rationale: References section cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> link directly.

design_system.rationale: 1 button rule(s) override `background` without also overriding `color`. The global button rule sets both, so this leaves the text colour inherited from the dark default (CLAUDE.md rule #6).

openQuestions.title: Add explicit edge case coverage
openQuestions.detail: Pick one failure mode the spec or chromestatus motivation calls out (unsupported browser, denied permission, empty input, etc.) and surface it as a distinct demo state alongside the happy path.

openQuestions.title: Pair every button background override with a colour override
openQuestions.detail: Audit the inline `<style>` block: each `button { background: ... }` (or `.foo-btn { background: ... }`) needs an explicit `color: ...` next to it. CLAUDE.md rule #6 documents the light-on-light invisibility bug this causes.

openQuestions.title: Manually verify against the spec text
openQuestions.detail: Reviewer-v1-subagent based the spec_match verdict on the chromestatus summary ("For a long time, SharedWorker has been disabled on Android due to concerns about its unpredictable process lifecycle. We believed that SharedWorker instances might terminate unexpectedly, without noticing to users or web developers, which w") because reading the full spec for every concept was out of budget. A human or follow-up agent should diff the demo's actual behaviour against https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/workers.html#shared-workers-and-the-sharedworker-interface to catch anything chromestatus glossed over.

summary: Concept ships ~2814 chars of script across 4 button(s) and 0 other control(s). hits 4 pass / 1 partial / 1 fail across the six rubric criteria.
